notes: This catalog is the repository-level SSOT for environment variable names and namespaces that are allowed in runtime entrypoints and governance automation.
It does not replace code-level runtime config objects; it governs variable identity, sensitivity, and allowed discovery roots.
Phase-1 governance only covers curated runtime/config/automation roots and intentionally excludes vendor, generated, and historical scratch files.

BASE_URL.description: Frontend base URL runtime value used by browser-side routing and selected smoke helpers.

COOL_ADMIN_ALLOW_MULTI_INSTANCE.description: Allows the backend dev-port guard to skip the single-instance restriction.

COOL_ADMIN_PROXY_TARGET.description: Explicit dev proxy target for cool-admin-vue.

DEV.description: Vite development-mode builtin consumed by cool-admin-vue.

LOCAL_DB_HOST.description: MySQL host for local Midway boot, migrations, seed, and audit scripts.

LOCAL_DB_NAME.description: MySQL database name for local Midway boot, migrations, seed, and audit scripts.

LOCAL_DB_PASSWORD.description: MySQL password for local Midway boot, migrations, seed, and audit scripts.

LOCAL_DB_PORT.description: MySQL port for local Midway boot, migrations, seed, and audit scripts.

LOCAL_DB_USER.description: MySQL username for local Midway boot, migrations, seed, and audit scripts.

MATERIAL_FRONTEND_BASE_URL.description: GUI smoke target for the material frontend proxy flow.

MATERIAL_GUI_BACKEND_CONFIG_PATH.description: Optional backend runtime fingerprint path for material GUI smoke.

MATERIAL_GUI_BROWSER.description: Playwright browser selection for material GUI smoke.

MATERIAL_GUI_HEADLESS.description: Headless toggle for material GUI smoke.

MODE.description: Vite runtime mode consumed by cool-admin-vue and cool-uni config.

PORT.description: Fallback backend runtime port override when COOL_ADMIN_PORT is absent.

STAGE2_SMOKE_ALLOW_RUNTIME_MISMATCH.description: Allows stage-2 smoke to continue when runtime fingerprint mismatch is accepted explicitly.

STAGE2_SMOKE_BASE_URL.description: Shared backend smoke base URL namespace for stage-2 flows.

STAGE2_SMOKE_CACHE_DIR.description: Shared cache directory namespace for stage-2 smoke and GUI helpers.

STAGE2_SMOKE_PASSWORD.description: Shared smoke password namespace for stage-2 flows.

STAGE2_SMOKE_USERNAME.description: Shared smoke username namespace for stage-2 GUI helpers.

UNI_INPUT_DIR.description: Uni/Vite build root override injected by cool-uni vite config.

VITE_DEV_PROXY_TARGET.description: Vite-side dev proxy target fallback for cool-admin-vue.

VITE_ROOT_DIR.description: Uni/Vite root directory injected during build startup.

WORK_PLAN_DINGTALK_SYNC_TOKEN.description: Work-plan DingTalk sync token consumed by the performance service.

patternVariables.description: Recruitment-chain smoke and live runtime namespace.
Theme-scoped smoke namespace. Theme-specific URLs, credentials, cache paths, and seed selectors must stay under this prefix.
